data.content: Shipment attempted from fix/doctor-bash-profile-wiring onto main. Local validation passed: cargo test -p loom-cli doctor and cargo test -p loom-cli. main was pushed to origin at 4f8e5db60ee9, but remote CI failed. GitHub Actions CI run 23494059290 failed in Format because cargo fmt --all --check reported a formatting diff in crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs near the .bash_profile-only completion test. Return to implementation to format the file and re-run shipment.
